title: chrysanthemum ptarmiciflorum
intro: Chrysanthemum ptarmiciflorum, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum or hangryeon, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to East Asia. Chrysanthemum ptarmiciflorum has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been shown to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in digestion. Chrysanthemum ptarmiciflorum is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat various ailments.
